# editViewDelegate

**Instance Property**

The delegate to notify when editing an event.

## Declaration

```swift
weak var editViewDelegate: (any EKEventEditViewDelegate)? { get set }
```

## Managing the Event Editing Interface

- **EKEventEditViewDelegate**: A notification sent to the delegate when the user finishes editing an event.
